nasb.text: Now Azmaveth the son of Adiel had charge of the king’s storehouses. And Jonathan the son of Uzziah had charge of the storehouses in the country, in the cities, in the villages and in the towers.

esv.text: Over the king’s treasuries was Azmaveth the son of Adiel; and over the treasuries in the country, in the cities, in the villages, and in the towers, was Jonathan the son of Uzziah;

cnv.text: 管理王的庫房的，是亞疊的兒子押斯馬威；管理郊野、城市、鄉村和望樓的倉庫的，是烏西雅的兒子約拿單；

ccb.text: 亚叠的儿子押斯马威管理王室的库房。乌西雅的儿子约拿单管理城邑、村庄和堡垒的库房。
